/soft/compilers/gcc/12.2.0/x86_64-suse-linux/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/MonteCarlo_gold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/MonteCarlo_kernel.cu.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/multithreading.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/MonteCarloMultiGPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o MonteCarloMultiGPU   -L/soft/compilers/cuda/cuda-12.3.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  /soft/compilers/cuda/cuda-12.3.0/lib64/libcurand.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
